description: Router v2 regression corpus. Each entry tests a specific routing failure mode identified in the cereals and snack_bars runs. Synthetic products only — real products are validated via the batch runners.

entries.description: Granola with almonds, hazelnuts and olive oil — ingredient WFF signals must NOT win over granola anchor

product.ingredients_text_he: שיבולת שועל, שקדים, אגוזי לוז, דבש, שמן זית, גרעיני חמניות

entries.rationale: Granola anchor (0.90) must fire before signal scoring. Nuts and olive oil in ingredient text are context_gated and should be suppressed because WFF name context is absent.

entries.description: Granola bar with whey protein isolate in ingredient list — must NOT route to dairy_protein

product.ingredients_text_he: שיבולת שועל, שוקולד, חלבון מי גבינה, גרעיני חמניות, דבש

entries.rationale: Granola anchor fires. dairy_protein signals are name_only — whey protein in ingredient text contributes nothing to dairy_protein routing.

entries.description: Yogurt-flavored biscuit — must NOT route to dairy_protein despite yogurt mention

product.ingredients_text_he: קמח, סוכר, שמן דקל, יוגורט אבקה, מלח

entries.rationale: Flavor suppressor: 'יוגורט' appears after 'בטעם' in name — dairy_protein signal suppressed. Biscuit anchor fires for snack_bar_granola.

entries.description: Plain yogurt with flavor — anchor fires; must be dairy_protein

product.ingredients_text_he: חלב, פקעות חלב, שמנת, תרבויות חיות

entries.rationale: 'יוגורט' appears at start of name, before 'בטעם'. Anchor fires; flavor suppressor does not apply when the product IS a yogurt.

entries.description: Oat drink (Oatly-style) — must route to beverage via liquid gate

product.ingredients_text_he: מים, שיבולת שועל, שמן חמניות, מלח

entries.rationale: 'משקה' in name fires name_only beverage signal. Known brand 'oatly' also triggers liquid gate. Low kcal nutritional hint confirms beverage.

entries.description: Almond plant milk with no 'משקה' in name — plant_milk heuristic must catch it
entries.rationale: Brand 'alpro' is known plant-milk brand — liquid gate triggers. nutrition_basis_claimed has 'ליטר' — fallback A also fires.

entries.description: Almond butter — anchor must fire for whole_food_fat
entries.rationale: Hard anchor 'חמאת שקדים' fires at confidence 0.93.

entries.description: Muesli with fruit — anchor must fire for snack_bar_granola

product.ingredients_text_he: שיבולת שועל, פירות יבשים, אגוזים, גרעיני חמניות

entries.rationale: Muesli anchor fires at 0.88. Nuts in ingredient text are context_gated WFF — suppressed because 'מוסלי' is in WFF_NAME_EXCLUSIONS.

entries.description: Cornflakes with added protein — anchor must fire for cereal

product.ingredients_text_he: תירס, סוכר, חלבון מי גבינה, ויטמינים, ברזל

entries.rationale: Cornflakes anchor fires at 0.93. dairy_protein is name_only — whey in ingredients contributes nothing.

entries.description: Mixed nuts — WFF context gate should fire (name IS a fat product)
entries.rationale: No anchor fires. 'מיקס' is in WFF_NAME_CONTEXT_REQUIRED, no WFF exclusion in name. Ingredient nuts are context_gated but FIRE because name context is present. High kcal + fat nutritional hint confirms.

entries.description: Granola cereal (morning position) — more specific anchor wins over plain granola anchor

product.ingredients_text_he: שיבולת שועל, דבש, שמן חמניות, קינמון

entries.rationale: 'גרנולה לבוקר' anchor (cereal, 0.90) and 'גרנולה' anchor (snack_bar_granola, 0.90) both fire. 'גרנולה לבוקר' is longer → wins.

entries.description: Kefir — anchor must fire for dairy_protein with kefir subtype
entries.rationale: Kefir anchor fires at 0.93. Although kefir is a liquid, it anchors to dairy_protein not beverage — it IS a dairy fermented product.
